zh.Salm, Bas Rhin, Duchy of Lorraine, Holy: 法國阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆
zh.lifeSummary: 當Wilhelm von Luxembourg於大約1078年出生在比利時盧布格時，他的父親Conrad Ier de Luxembourg39歲，母親Clémence d'Aquitaine19歲。他於1105年與Luitgarde von Beichlingen結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1131年4月24日享年54歲。

zh-hans.Salm, Bas Rhin, Duchy of Lorraine, Holy: 法国阿爾薩斯巴-爾薩爾姆
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Wilhelm von Luxembourg于大约1078年出生在比利时盧布格时，他的父亲Conrad Ier de Luxembourg39岁，母亲Clémence d'Aquitaine19岁。他于1105年与Luitgarde von Beichlingen结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1131年4月24日享年54岁。

nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Wilhelm
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: from wil ‘will’ + helm ‘helmet’; an ancient royal name. See also William .

variants.name: William
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

en.lifeSummary: When Wilhelm von Luxembourg was born about 1078, in Luxembourg, Belgium, his father, Conrad Ier de Luxembourg, was 39 and his mother, Clémence d'Aquitaine, was 19. He married Luitgarde von Beichlingen in 1105. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 24 April 1131, at the age of 54.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Wilhelm von Luxembourg est né environ 1078, à Luxembourg, Belgique, son père, Conrad Ier de Luxembourg, avait 39 ans et sa mère, Clémence d'Aquitaine, avait 19 ans. Il a épousé Luitgarde von Beichlingen en 1105. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 24 avril 1131, à l’âge de 54 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Wilhelm von Luxembourg um 1078 in Luxemburg, Belgien geboren wurde, war sein Vater Conrad Ier de Luxembourg 39 und seine Mutter Clémence d'Aquitaine 19. Er hat 1105 Luitgarde von Beichlingen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 24. April 1131 im Alter von 54 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Luxembourg è nato il circa 1078 nel Lussemburgo, Belgio, il suo padre, Conrad Ier de Luxembourg, aveva 39 anni e il suo madre, Clémence d'Aquitaine, aveva 19 anni. Lui sposato Luitgarde von Beichlingen nel 1105. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 24 aprile 1131, all'età di 54 anni.

ja.Luxembourg, Belgium: ベルギールクセンボウルグ
ja.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Luxembourgが約1078年にベルギールクセンボウルグで生まれた時，父Conrad Ier de Luxembourgは39歳，母Clémence d'Aquitaineは19歳であった。1105年にLuitgarde von Beichlingenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1131年4月24日に54歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Wilhelm von Luxembourg(이)가 대략 1078년 벨기에 루세보우르그에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Conrad Ier de Luxembourg(은)는 39세였고, 그의 어머니 Clémence d'Aquitaine(은)는 19세였다. 그는 1105년 Luitgarde von Beichlingen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1131년 4월 24일 54세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Wilhelm von Luxembourg nasceu aproximadamente 1078, em Luxemburgo, Bélgica, seu pai, Conrad Ier de Luxembourg, tinha 39 anos e sua mãe, Clémence d'Aquitaine, tinha 19 anos. Ele casou-se com Luitgarde von Beichlingen em 1105. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 24 de abril de 1131, com 54 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Wilhelm von Luxembourg родился около 1078 г. в местности луксембург, Бельгия, его отцу по имени Conrad Ier de Luxembourg было 39 лет, а матери, которую звали Clémence d'Aquitaine, 19. Он женился на женщине по имени Luitgarde von Beichlingen в 1105 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 24 апреля 1131 г. в возрасте 54 лет.

sm.1096-1131: mai le 1096 e o'o I le 1131

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Wilhelm von Luxembourg nació aproximadamente 1078, en Luxemburgo, Bélgica, su papá, Conrad Ier de Luxembourg, tenía 39 años y su mamá, Clémence d'Aquitaine, tenía 19 años. Se casó con Luitgarde von Beichlingen en 1105. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 24 de abril de 1131, a la edad de 54 años.
